summary.zh: 输入草稿可跨重启保留，会话环境变化会自动提醒，Bridge 凭证与钉钉鉴权更稳妥，并更新 GPT-5.6 与 Grok 模型默认能力。
summary.en: Input drafts now persist across restarts, sessions get automatic environment-change reminders, Bridge secrets and DingTalk auth are more reliable, and GPT-5.6 plus Grok model defaults are updated.

title.zh: 输入框草稿跨重启持久化

summary.zh: 首页和每个会话未发送的输入草稿会按桌面端 / 手机端分别保存；发送或创建会话后自动清除，永久删除会话时也会一并清理。
summary.en: Unsent drafts on the home screen and in each session are saved separately for desktop and mobile; they clear after send or session creation, and are removed when a session is permanently deleted.

details.zh: 重启应用后，未发送的文字草稿会回到原来的输入框。
details.en: After restarting the app, unsent text drafts return to the same input box.

sources.title: feat: persist input drafts to server per surface

title.zh: 会话感知的环境变化提醒

summary.zh: 工具集、记忆、压缩或时间过期等环境变化会以隐藏提醒交给当前会话；恢复休眠会话或时间过久时也会补上时间提醒。
summary.en: Environment changes such as toolset, memory, compaction, or stale clock updates are delivered as hidden reminders to the current session; restored or long-idle sessions also receive a time reminder.

details.zh: 提示里的冻结时间标签改为「Session start time」；主动查询当前时间会刷新提醒时钟。
details.en: The frozen prompt timestamp is now labeled Session start time; an explicit current-time check refreshes the reminder clock.

title.zh: 自有 GPT-5.6 模型目录与能力契约
title.en: Owned GPT-5.6 model catalog and capability contracts

summary.zh: Codex OAuth 的聊天模型目录改由 Hana 维护；GPT-5.6 使用更新后的上下文窗口与推理默认值，用户白名单与元数据在重启后仍保持权威。
summary.en: The Codex OAuth chat catalog is now maintained by Hana; GPT-5.6 uses updated context-window and reasoning defaults, while user allowlists and metadata remain authoritative across restarts.

title.zh: Bridge 凭证保护与钉钉鉴权修复
title.en: Bridge secret protection and DingTalk auth repair

summary.zh: 已保存的 Bridge 密钥以不可复制的已存储状态显示；钉钉改用企业 ID 与现行 token API，出站失败会把连接标为降级。
summary.en: Saved Bridge secrets render as non-copyable stored state; DingTalk now uses Corp ID with the current token API, and outbound failures mark the connector as degraded.

sources.title: fix(bridge): preserve secrets and repair DingTalk auth

title.zh: 收窄全局右键菜单，避免叠层
title.en: Narrowed the global context menu to avoid stacking

summary.zh: 只读「复制」菜单仅在聊天、频道、预览和设置区出现；侧边栏等非输入区域不再弹出全局复制菜单，输入框编辑菜单保持不变。
summary.en: The read-only Copy menu now appears only in chat, channel, preview, and settings areas; non-input areas such as the sidebar no longer show the global copy menu, while input edit menus stay the same.

sources.title: fix: 收窄全局右键菜单，避免与业务菜单叠层

title.zh: 更新 xAI Grok 默认模型与能力元数据
title.en: Updated xAI Grok default models and capability metadata

summary.zh: 刷新 xAI 提供商预设与策展默认 Grok 模型，已知模型能力信息更贴近当前目录。
summary.en: Refreshed xAI provider presets and curated default Grok models so known-model capability info better matches the current catalog.
